/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/tests/test_mapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/tests/test_validate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/tests/test_renderers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/tests/test_insert_renderers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/src/mapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/src/validate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/src/backends/clickhouse_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/src/backends/clickhouse_insert_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/src/backends/timescale_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/src/backends/timescale_insert_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/db_options.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/dbddl_tests.dir/mapper_test_types.pb.cc.o -o dbddl_tests  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
